title: Database connection timeout on prod-db-01
description: The primary production database prod-db-01 is unreachable. TCP connections are timing out on port 5432. All microservices depending on this DB are returning 503 errors.

title: Suspicious login attempts from unknown IP
description: Over 500 failed SSH login attempts detected from source IP 185.220.101.42 in the last 10 minutes. Brute-force attack pattern identified by SIEM.

title: Checkout service returning NullPointerException
description: The checkout microservice is throwing a NullPointerException when processing cart items with promo codes. Error code NPE-4421. Stack trace logged in Splunk.

title: Network switch offline in DC rack B
description: Core network switch SW-B04 in data center rack B has gone offline. VLAN 20 and VLAN 30 segments are down, affecting 14 servers. ICMP pings to 10.0.20.1 are failing.

title: Ransomware signature detected on workstation
description: Endpoint detection tool flagged ransomware signatures (WannaCry variant) on workstation DESK-114. Files are being encrypted. The machine has been isolated from the network.

title: Payment gateway timeout - Stripe API 503
description: The payment service is receiving HTTP-503 responses from the Stripe API gateway. All payment transactions are failing with timeout after 30 s. Error code: STRIPE-TIMEOUT-503.

title: Intermittent packet loss on VLAN 30
description: Network monitoring shows intermittent packet loss of 12-18% on VLAN 30 between 10.0.30.0/24 and the core router. UDP traffic is most affected. Degraded performance observed.

title: Phishing email reported by 3 employees
description: Three employees received a phishing email impersonating the IT helpdesk, requesting password resets via a spoofed link. Source IP: 203.0.113.77. Email quarantined.

title: API response slow - P95 latency 4.2s
description: The product catalogue API is experiencing slow response times. P95 latency has increased to 4.2 seconds, up from the SLA threshold of 500 ms. No exception raised, but throughput degraded.

title: Scheduled job failed - non-production env
description: The nightly data-sync scheduled job failed in the staging environment due to a stale credentials error. No production impact. Job can be re-run manually.

title: Minor firewall rule misconfiguration found
description: A security audit identified a misconfigured firewall rule that allows unrestricted inbound traffic on port 8080 from any source. Risk is low as the port is not currently exposed publicly.

title: DNS resolution intermittent on 10.2.0.0/16
description: Users on the 10.2.0.0/16 subnet are experiencing intermittent DNS resolution failures. The secondary DNS server at 10.2.0.2 appears unresponsive. Primary is healthy.
